comfyui_prompt.positive: single isolated custom cake, reference-inspired but not identical, unknown shaped cake, main colors: light green, decoration elements: strawberry 4pcs, lettering: top center lettering reading "HBD!", style and mood: clean custom cake style, clean 3D cake design mockup for order confirmation, semi-realistic but simplified, show only one cake body, isolated on a completely plain pure white background, no support object, no cake stand, no board, no plate, no tray, no table, no props
comfyui_prompt.negative: cake stand, pedestal, support object, cake board, plate, tray, table, fabric background, cloth, props, extra objects, background objects, multiple cakes, hands, people, watermark, logo, blurry, low quality, gray studio background, gradient background, pattern background, product photography setup, oversized lettering, unreadable lettering, misspelled text, identical copy of the reference image, exact same layout, copied design
